name: Tex-Mex Turkey Tenderloins
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Turkey tenderloin steaks (cut about 1/2 inch thick)
4 oz (1 can) Diced green chili peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the turkey and pat dry. Stir together cumin, salt, and pepper.
2. Sprinkle both sides of the turkey tenderloin steaks with the spice mixture.
3. Spray a cold large skillet with nonstick coating.
4. Preheat over medium heat. Cook the turkey in the skillet for 10 to 12 minutes or until it is tender and no longer pink, turning once.
5. Transfer the turkey to a serving platter. Cover with foil to keep warm.
6. Add chopped tomato, zucchini, sliced green onions, and diced chili peppers to the skillet. Cook and stir over high heat for 1 to 2 minutes or until the vegetables are crisp-tender.
7. Spoon the vegetables over the turkey. If desired, garnish with fresh chili peppers. Makes 4 servings.
Food Exchange per serving: 3 Lean Meat Exchanges + 1 Vegetable Exchange
Source: Better Homes and Gardens Diabetic Cookbook
Brought to you and yours by Nancy O'Brion and her Meal-Master
